title: 3 Mistakes That Kill Funded Accounts (Fix These Now)
description: Blowing a funded account hurts. But 90% of traders make the same 3 mistakes — and they're all fixable. R2F Trading breaks down the exact errors smart money traders avoid. Watch before your next trade. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups, order block breakdowns, and funded trader strategies in 2026.
script: If you've blown a funded account — this is for you. 78% of traders fail their challenge for the same 3 reasons. And none of them are about strategy. Mistake one. Trading without a kill zone. Random entries get random results. Smart money moves during London and New York open — not all day. If you're trading at noon with no confluence, you're gambling. Mistake two. Ignoring fair value gaps. FVGs are where price wants to return. Beginners chase breakouts. Funded traders wait for the fill. Miss the FVG, miss the move. Every time. Mistake three — and this one hurts. Revenge trading after a loss. One bad trade becomes three. Account down 8% by lunch. The R2F Trading system has one rule: two losses in a day, you're done. Walk away. Protect the account. Fix these three. Trade the kill zones. Hunt fair value gaps. Kill revenge trading. That's how traders get funded and stay funded. Follow R2F Trading. New setups every single day.
